criteria.reason: Current code normalizes deployment/tab query params in FlowController, the editor reads and syncs them from the URL in Editor.vue, the Dev/Prod switch is present in FlowEditorHeader.vue, and php artisan test --compact tests/Feature/FlowDeploymentsPayloadTest.php passed.

Current editor state keeps code/chat/history shared while selected deployment drives start-stop actions, graph, logs, discovery, summary, and storage environment; payload separation is covered by FlowDeploymentsPayloadTest and fresh checks passed.

The current tab model includes overview plus all workspace tabs, Editor.vue restores and updates tab state from the URL including browser navigation, and FlowDeploymentsPayloadTest passed for query-driven tab selection.

Current FlowController and FlowActionController redirects preserve normalized deployment/tab query state, Editor.vue appends that state to outgoing actions, and the targeted FlowRunErrorHandlingTest and FlowGraphDefaultsTest both passed.

Fresh verifier reruns succeeded for Pint, npm lint, npm build, FlowDeploymentsPayloadTest, FlowRunErrorHandlingTest, and FlowGraphDefaultsTest, and those tests cover both payload shape and redirect preservation for the new query-driven editor state.

commands_run.summary: Passed; Vite production build completed successfully.
